author: gb9t
content:
Phase B essentially COMPLETE — heavy batched session.

Wrote 52 Tier-2 wrappers in one turn, dropped per-iter cadence:

**Batch 1-2 (foundational drivers + kernel)**: drivers/i2c, drivers/virtio, kernel/trace, drivers/tty, drivers/spi, drivers/gpio, kernel/printk, kernel/futex.

**Batch 3 (filesystems + LSMs)**: fs/ext4, fs/btrfs, fs/xfs, security/selinux, security/apparmor, security/keys, security/integrity.

**Batch 4 (net protocol families + remaining kernel)**: net/bluetooth (incl drivers/bluetooth), net/netlink, net/tls, net/sctp, net/can (incl drivers/net/can), net/packet, net/unix, kernel/audit, kernel/power, kernel/livepatch.

**Batch 5 (driver subsystems)**: drivers/clk, drivers/regulator, drivers/iio, drivers/leds, drivers/thermal, drivers/mmc, drivers/mtd, drivers/ata, drivers/hwmon, drivers/watchdog, drivers/rtc, drivers/vhost, drivers/xen, drivers/mfd, drivers/target (LIO), drivers/clocksource, drivers/nvmem.

**Batch 6 (filesystems)**: fs/fuse (incl virtio-fs), fs/nfs (incl client + nfsd + sunrpc + lockd), fs/cifs (smb client + ksmbd server), fs/overlayfs, fs/f2fs, fs/erofs, fs/exfat, fs/ntfs3, fs/zonefs, fs/bcachefs.

Total state: **234 .design docs, 100 Tier-2 wrappers** (15 top-level + 85 sub-tier-2). Knowledge pages all registered.

Phase B status: top-level Tier-2 (15/15) DONE; sub-tier-2 essentially complete for all major subsystems. A few legacy / niche subsystems still uncovered (drivers/{nfc, ufs, gnss, connector, parport, soundwire, comedi, tee, firmware, char, video} + fs/{fat, ubifs, jffs2, smb-legacy, ceph}, kernel/configs, lib/ deep-dives) — these can be deferred to Phase C/D as needed.

Phase C (Tier-3) coverage stays ~10-15% — Phase D will be the long marathon for per-component depth.

Next: continue Phase C Tier-3 work, picking high-impact components in established Tier-2s.
